title: Sympathy for the Devil
why_this_song: Sympathy for the Devil by The Rolling Stones (1968) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Hope you guess my name"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "But what's puzzlin' you"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Pleased to meet you"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Hope you guess my name"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Tell me, baby, what's my name?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I watched with glee while your kings and queens
Fought for ten decades for the gods they made
I shouted out, "Who killed the Kennedys?"
Is the nature of my game

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "name" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "name" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "what's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "what's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Please allow me to introduce myself
Just as every cop is a criminal

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm a man of wealth and taste
Who get killed before they reach Bombay
So if you meet me, have some courtesy

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Sympathy for the Devil" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Sympathy for the Devil" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Sympathy for the Devil", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Sympathy for the Devil", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Sympathy for the Devil" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Sympathy for the Devil" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
